---
title: "Agnes Giberne"
---

## Agnes Giberne

**Dates:** (1845-1939)

### Description

novelist, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1893, 5)

### Biography

She sometimes wrote as A.G., and may be the author of earlier contributions to <i>MP</i> signed thus.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 5th 1896
- Letter from July 13th1889

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
